content.text:
*[shifts in seat, expression flickers briefly before the performative energy comes back]*

I mean — it's just... it's a genuine question, right? Like, is there something I'm putting out there? Some vibe that says "please be unavailable to me"? Because I don't *want* this. I actively, consciously want a partner who is *present* and warm and — you know — *there*. 

*[gestures expressively]*

And I've done the work! I've read the books, I've been in therapy, I know the whole attachment thing, I can name it. Anxious-avoidant trap, classic, textbook. So I *know* what's happening and it keeps happening anyway, which is honestly the most frustrating part. Like I can see the pattern from the outside and I still just — walk right into it every time.

*[slight laugh, self-deprecating]*

So yeah, underneath "what's wrong with me" is probably just... I don't know. Confusion? Frustration? The feeling that I'm somehow cursed?
